TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tarik_Black, title = Tarik_Black, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tarik_Black} }

S.FORM: Tarik Black hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 11, Tarik Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tarik Black hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 11, Tarik Black, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tarik βlaʦ~ʨk ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tarik βlaʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
